hero.eyebrow: Open to SWE internships and new-grad roles
hero.headline: Full-stack engineer building mobile, backend, and AI-powered systems.
hero.summary: Computer Science and Mathematics student at DePauw University with hands-on experience across React Native, TypeScript, Node APIs, Java Spring Boot, Oracle SQL, cloud tooling, and automation workflows.

about.intro: I am a Computer Science and Mathematics student who likes building across the full stack: mobile interfaces, backend APIs, database workflows, and AI-assisted product features.
details: At VietinBank, I worked on Spring Boot and Oracle SQL modules for transaction validation, account lookup, authentication, reporting, and Python automation.
For KITES, I built a React Native and TypeScript safety app with parent/child roles, location tracking, push notifications, real-time messaging, and a Gemini-powered assistant.
I bring a math-heavy problem-solving background, debugging experience as a technical lab assistant, and a practical bias toward systems that are useful to real users.

metrics.label: less manual review via Python + SQL automation

education.degree: B.A. in Computer Science and Mathematics

projects.name: KITES
projects.summary: Native Android child-safety platform with parent/child roles, persistent sessions, live location, messaging, SOS alerts, and an embedded Gemini assistant.
impact: Built role-based navigation and authentication for parent and child flows.
Implemented Socket.IO/STOMP-style real-time communication, push alerts, battery-level monitoring, and image sharing.
Designed an AI assistant flow with Gemini prompt handling and multi-turn conversation context.

projects.name: VietinBank Internal APIs
projects.summary: Transaction-validation, account lookup, authentication, and reporting APIs for internal financial dashboards.
impact: Implemented Java Spring Boot modules backed by Oracle SQL for transaction and account workflows.
Automated daily financial checks with Python and SQL, reducing manual review workload by about 80%.
Cut recurring report generation time by 40% for operations teams.

projects.name: Space Station Rescue Simulator
projects.summary: 2D orbital rescue simulator with moving objects, space stations, collision detection, and modular mission logic.
impact: Built Java Swing/AWT rendering and controls for 5+ stations and 20+ moving objects.
Used spatial hashing to improve debris interaction performance by about 30%.
Applied Command and State patterns to simplify level integration.

projects.name: AI Chatbot
projects.summary: Browser-based chatbot with asynchronous Gemini calls, prompt handling, session state, loading feedback, and responsive chat UI.
impact: Implemented multi-turn message handling and context-aware session flow.
Designed loading, error, and response rendering states for a smoother chat experience.
Built the UI with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for direct browser portability.

details: Coordinated workflows across Salesforce, Webflow, and Make, automating 12+ approval and validation steps.
Integrated Salesforce CRM with internal databases through APIs to keep data consistent across three automation tools.
Worked with Microsoft and IBM partners to troubleshoot API connections and standardize integration workflows.
Implemented transaction-validation and account-lookup modules in Java Spring Boot with Oracle SQL.
Automated financial checks with Python and SQL for 50+ daily records.
Developed authentication and reporting APIs for internal dashboard data retrieval.
Provided 1:1 debugging support for syntax, logic, and runtime errors.
Participated in code reviews and helped resolve critical bugs for better project stability.
Supported students in completing programming assignments on time.
Built responsive educational platform features with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Improved accessibility and student/instructor user experience.
Implemented real-time homework and exam updates for 200+ users.
